name: 2026-05-09-install-bash-source-unbound-warning
title: install.sh: BASH_SOURCE[0] unbound-variable warning under curl-pipe mode
description: When install.sh is invoked via 'curl ... | bash', BASH_SOURCE is unset and 'set -u' triggers an unbound-variable warning before the script falls into curl-tarball mode. Install completes successfully but the warning is confusing for first-time users. One-line fix available: add :- default expansion to ${BASH_SOURCE[0]:-}.

history.note: Applied Option B fix: RAW_SOURCE guard + local-mode double-check (-f install.sh). Added t16 regression test (curl-pipe no-warning). Updated README to document curl|bash variant for tcsh/csh. Updated spec.md test count to 17. All 17 tests pass.
